# Unicode Edge Cases

## Zero-Width Characters

Zero-width joiner: 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 (family emoji using ZWJ sequences)

Zero-width space between words: word​word (U+200B between)

## Combining Characters

Combining diacritics: à (a + combining grave) vs à (precomposed)

Zalgo text: H̸̡̪̯ͨ͊̽̅̾̎ȩ̬̩̾͛ͪ̈́̚ ̨̻̱̪̠͙c̝̘̝̞̙̍ȏ̷̙̝̝̞̩m̴̘̝̞̩̗̍ẹ̴̘̝̞̩̗̍s̴̘̝̞̩̗̍

## Emoji Sequences

Skin tones: 👍🏻 👍🏼 👍🏽 👍🏾 👍🏿

Flag sequences: 🇫🇷 🇬🇧 🇺🇸 🇯🇵 🇨🇳 🇰🇷 🇮🇳

Compound emoji: 👨‍💻 👩‍🔬 🏳️‍🌈

## Special Characters

Null-like: ␀ (U+2400 SYMBOL FOR NULL)

Replacement character: � (U+FFFD)

Interrobang: ‽

Em dash: — En dash: – Ellipsis: …

Math: ∑∏∫∂∇ ℝℂℕℤℚ

## Right-to-Left Override

Normal text followed by RTL: مرحبا

Mixed: Hello مرحبا World سلام End
